 {"id":"ft-1u90p.8.4","title":"Write incident response and rollback runbooks for resize/reflow regressions","description":"Document detection-to-mitigation procedures, kill-switch usage, and verification checklists for production incidents.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Implementation is complete for the stated scope and behavior is validated.
- Unit tests are added/updated for core logic and edge cases.
- Integration and/or e2e coverage is updated where this task affects multi-component behavior.
- Structured telemetry/logging is added for observability and regression triage.
- No regressions in existing terminal semantics within the affected scope.","notes":"Completed docs slice for wa-1u90p.8.4: added docs/resize-incident-response-rollback-runbook-wa-1u90p.8.4.md with severity matrix, triage loop, containment/rollback procedure, evidence templates, and exit criteria; linked from docs/resize-rollout-plan-wa-1u90p.8.2.md rollback section and dependency list.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"EmeraldEagle","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-02-13T00:25:48.445734Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-15T21:04:09.997819Z","closed_at":"2026-02-15T21:04:09.987695Z","close_reason":"Completed docs runbook and rollout-plan linkage","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ops","reflow","resize","runbook","track-rollout"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.4","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.6.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.4","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.4","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.4","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"ft-1u90p.8.5","title":"Publish user-facing release/tuning guidance for different hardware tiers","description":"Provide clear guidance on expected behavior, config knobs, and troubleshooting paths across low/mid/high-end hardware.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Implementation is complete for the stated scope and behavior is validated.
- Unit tests are added/updated for core logic and edge cases.
- Integration and/or e2e coverage is updated where this task affects multi-component behavior.
- Structured telemetry/logging is added for observability and regression triage.
- No regressions in existing terminal semantics within the affected scope.","notes":"Dependency rationale: user-facing tuning guidance depends on controlled beta results so recommendations reflect observed real-world smoothness and artifact behavior across hardware tiers.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"OliveDesert","estimated_minutes":120,"created_at":"2026-02-13T00:25:48.550243Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-20T01:55:29.935731Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["docs","reflow","resize","track-rollout","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.5","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.4.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.5","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.4.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.5","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.5","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.5","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":523,"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.5","author":"OliveDesert","text":"OliveDesert progress (2026-02-20): drafted user-facing hardware-tier guidance doc at docs/resize-user-facing-release-tuning-guidance-wa-1u90p.8.5.md covering low/mid/high expectations, recommended tuning profiles (Conservative/Balanced/Performance), release channel posture, troubleshooting commands, fallback triggers, and release-notes template. Added cross-link from docs/resize-rollout-plan-wa-1u90p.8.2.md so rollout documentation chain now references this guidance.","created_at":"2026-02-20T01:55:29Z"}]}
 {"id":"ft-1u90p.8.6","title":"Execute final go/no-go review and archive evidence bundle for sign-off","description":"## Context
Final release promotion requires a single authoritative evidence package and decision record.

## Scope
Execute formal go/no-go review using objective evidence from correctness, performance, reliability, and user-perception tracks.

## Deliverables
- Consolidated evidence bundle (unit/integration/e2e/perf/soak outputs)
- Risk register with residual risks and mitigation ownership
- Signed decision record with explicit release rationale and rollback readiness

## Why this matters
Ensures release quality and accountability are evidence-driven, not impression-driven.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Evidence bundle includes pass/fail summaries and links to detailed artifacts for all required tracks.
- No unresolved critical blocker remains; exceptions are explicitly approved and documented.
- Rollback plan, kill-switch verification, and on-call readiness are confirmed.
- Decision record references beta feedback and SLO compliance data.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":120,"created_at":"2026-02-13T00:25:48.654838Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-13T00:53:50.003001Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["governance","reflow","release","resize","track-rollout"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.7.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.7.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.7.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.7.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"ft-1u90p.8.7","title":"Run controlled beta feedback loop with user-perceived smoothness telemetry","description":"## Context
Lab metrics alone can miss user-perception failures.

## Scope
Add a structured beta loop combining telemetry and qualitative feedback to validate perceived smoothness and stability before broad rollout.

## Deliverables
- Beta cohort plan and feedback taxonomy
- Telemetry-to-feedback correlation dashboard
- Decision rubric for promotion/rollback between rollout stages

## Why this matters
Ensures release decisions reflect real user outcomes, not just internal benchmark wins.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Beta runs collect statistically useful telemetry and categorized feedback.
- Promotion decisions cite both objective SLOs and perception signals.
- Findings are documented and reflected in final release guidance.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Beta cohort: minimum 20 users across 3 hardware tiers (low/mid/high)
2. Feedback mechanism: in-app survey (5 questions) + telemetry opt-in
3. Telemetry: frame time histogram, resize event count, artifact occurrence count, user-perceived-smoothness score
4. Statistical threshold: 90% of users report smoothness >= 4/5
5. Telemetry-feedback correlation: Pearson r > 0.7 between measured frame times and perceived smoothness
6. Decision rubric: promote if both telemetry SLOs met AND user satisfaction >= 90%; rollback if either fails","notes":"Dependency rationale: controlled beta is gated by compatibility contract, alt-screen conformance, soak stability, telemetry dashboards, and canary plan so user-facing exposure starts only after high-risk regressions are screened out.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"HazyCreek","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-02-13T00:52:30.389606Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-22T07:28:07.051293Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["feedback","reflow","resize","rollout","track-rollout","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.7","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.7.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.7","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.7.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.7","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.7.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.7","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.7.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.7","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.7","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.7","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.7","depends_on_id":"ft-1u90p.8.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":457,"issue_id":"ft-1u90p.8.7","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"Assigned to HazyCreek (blocked by ft-1u90p.7.7). Added preparatory deliverable doc: docs/resize-controlled-beta-feedback-loop-wa-1u90p.8.7.md covering beta cohort plan + feedback taxonomy, telemetry-to-feedback correlation contract, and GO/HOLD/ROLLBACK rubric. Ready to execute final pass once ft-1u90p.7.7 closes.","created_at":"2026-02-18T05:04:23Z"}]}

 {"id":"ft-1u9qw","title":"Protocol-versioned local IPC namespace and compatibility handshake","description":"Goal: adopt contract-versioned local socket namespace and explicit compatibility handshake for FrankenTerm local IPC (robot and native). Why: prevent client/server skew from attaching to incompatible sessions. Scope: version local IPC endpoints by protocol or schema version, add handshake with explicit mismatch error payload (expected and actual version), define compatibility policy, and add integration tests for mismatch and upgrade. Deliverables: IPC versioning spec, endpoint discovery implementation changes, and compatibility tests with operator-visible diagnostics. Acceptance criteria: incompatible clients rejected deterministically with stable error code; compatible clients connect without behavior regressions; robot and native workflows keep stable semantics across patch upgrades. Cross-references: wa-vcjbi, wa-3kxe, wa-dr6zv, wa-3dfxb.13.","notes":"wa-1u9qw implementation now fully re-applied and validated in workspace.
Changes completed:
1) crates/frankenterm-core/src/ipc.rs
- Added protocol constants: IPC_CONTRACT_DIR_NAME=contract_version_1, IPC_PROTOCOL_VERSION=1, IPC_PROTOCOL_MISMATCH_CODE=ipc.protocol_mismatch.
- Added IpcEnvelope.protocol_version with serde default for legacy requests.
- Server rejects protocol mismatch or missing protocol version with stable code ipc.protocol_mismatch and expected vs actual message.
- Auth failures now return stable code ipc.auth_denied.
- Client includes protocol_version in every IPC envelope.
- Added tests: ipc_envelope_includes_protocol_version and ipc_rejects_protocol_mismatch.
2) crates/frankenterm-core/src/config.rs
- Default ipc.socket_path now uses IPC_SOCKET_NAME constant.
- Relative IPC socket paths now resolve under .ft/contract_version_1.
- Added tests for namespaced relative path and absolute-path passthrough.
3) crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs and crates/frankenterm-core/src/mcp.rs
- IPC pane-state helper now surfaces error_code with detail in returned error string.
Validation completed:
- rustfmt --edition 2024 on changed files: pass.
- cargo check -p frankenterm-core --lib --target-dir target_emerald: pass.
- cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib ipc::tests::ipc_envelope_includes_protocol_version --target-dir target_emerald: pass.
- cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib ipc::tests::ipc_rejects_protocol_mismatch --target-dir target_emerald: pass.
- cargo check -p frankenterm --target-dir target_emerald: pass.
- cargo check -p frankenterm-core --features mcp --target-dir target_emerald: pass.
Repo-wide gates status:
- cargo fmt --check fails due pre-existing unrelated formatting diffs across many files.
- cargo check --all-targets --target-dir target_emerald: pass.
- cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings fails due many pre-existing strict-lint issues unrelated to this bead.
Coordination note:
- Encountered repeated concurrent rewrites on target files; resolved via urgent agent-mail coordination and completed atomic reapply.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"EmeraldHawk","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:44:08.350339Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-12T08:11:36.444914Z","closed_at":"2026-02-12T08:11:36.444898Z","close_reason":"Implemented protocol-versioned IPC handshake + contract namespace pathing + error surfacing + targeted validation","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"ft-1uqi","title":"FTUI-03.2.a Route in-process logs through single output sink","description":"## Background
In-process output must obey one-writer constraints to keep rendering deterministic and avoid output corruption.

## Deliverables
- inventory and removal plan for direct stdout/stderr writes in UI-active paths
- unified output sink routing contract for logs/events/status lines
- verification checks to prove no bypass writes remain

## Acceptance Criteria
- all targeted paths route through the sanctioned sink while UI is active
- checks detect and fail on new bypass writes
- validation evidence includes unit assertions and runtime logs demonstrating routing correctness.,","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CalmLynx","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:14:05.996650629Z","created_by":"GrayHarbor","updated_at":"2026-02-09T05:12:15.499308732Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T05:12:15.499172890Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-1uqi","depends_on_id":"ft-3cso","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1uqi","depends_on_id":"ft-3g47","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"ft-1utb","title":"FTUI-02.1 Add ftui dependency stack and feature-gated integration path","description":"## Background\nwa must consume /dp/frankentui intentionally, not ad-hoc.\n\n## Deliverables\n- Cargo feature strategy for ftui adoption path\n- path/git pin policy to /dp/frankentui\n- explicit toggles for legacy/new tui runtime\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- project builds with and without ftui migration feature\n- dependency graph is documented and deterministic.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"LavenderGrove","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:07:39.031226995Z","created_by":"GrayHarbor","updated_at":"2026-02-09T01:18:40.996712962Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T01:18:40.996571069Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-1utb","depends_on_id":"ft-136q","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-1utb","depends_on_id":"ft-1k52","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:29:20Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
